hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'marketing-data.json$'; then echo 'marketing-data.json modified — run /marketing:status to check data integrity'; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'competitor-data.json$'; then echo 'competitor-data.json modified — run /marketing:scrape-competitors or /marketing:track-winners to review'; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'creative-data.json$'; then echo 'creative-data.json modified — run /marketing:generate-creatives to review batch status'; fi

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'campaign-data.json$'; then echo 'campaign-data.json modified — run /marketing:campaign-status to check pipeline status'; fi
